Interpret the request, fill the evidence-grounded semantic fields, decide accept or refuse, assign admitted agents to all required capabilities, and provide dependency-respecting capability execution_order. terminal_goals.evidence_text: For this data analytics work, assemble the source material, quality-check it, and keep the finalized outcome for long-term records under standard assurance in structured JSON.
Check the assembled data analytics material for correctness.
Release the checked final brief for data analytics.
Preserve the checked data analytics brief for long-term retention.
